attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_HEADER.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_HEADER.SUBMITTER, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_HEADER.EXP_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_HEADER.SOLCAT_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_HEADER.SALES_ORDER_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_HEADER.PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_HEADER.IC_ORDER_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_HEADER.SO_HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_HEADER.APPROVER, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_HEADER.CUSTOMER_NAME, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_HEADER.REQUEST_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_HEADER.STRUCTURE_NODE_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_HEADER.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_HEADER.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_HEADER.LAST_UPDATED_DATE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_HEADER.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_HEADER.CS_TEAM, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_HEADER.THEATER, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_HEADER.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_HEADER.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_HEADER.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_HEADER.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_HEADER.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_HEADER STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_HEADER,
 (
 select REQUEST_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_HEADER
 minus
 select REQUEST_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXGCO_EXP_REQUEST_HEADER
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.REQUEST_ID = STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_HEADER.REQUEST_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_HEADER.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXGCO_EXP_REQUEST_HEADER)
